tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: Only 10% left on this assignment? I can crush it in minutes and ignore everything else until tomorrow.
The deadline just slipped past while I was still at 95%? That's a disaster. I need to finish this NOW before the system locks me out.
99% done in half an hour? I wasted time worrying when I could have just finished this and moved on.

desires: Crush the remaining 1.2% of the assignment immediately to secure the grade and stop the stress bleed
Ignore all social niceties or filler tasks until the 'submit' button is clicked
Prove to myself (and the professor) that I can deliver a perfect result on demand despite the chaos

goals.description: Force-submit the assignment immediately to lock in the perfect grade (99%+), accepting that further refinement is a waste of time.
goals.rationale: My achievement value (0.5) demands I maximize the academic output right now. The deadline passed, but the system allows it; my impulsive nature screams for an immediate 'win' rather than risking a total zero by waiting. Relationships and tidying are irrelevant distractions.

goals.description: Ignore all incoming notifications and social cues until the submission button is clicked.
goals.rationale: I am assertive and direct; any interaction now is a threat to the immediate goal. My short planning horizon means I cannot afford to multitask or engage in 'polite' communication delays.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances goal g1 (99%+ grade) immediately. My impulsive drive demands the 'win' of submission now; social side effects like ignoring notifications are acceptable costs for this high-value academic outcome.

goals.description: Finalize the remaining 10% of the graded assignment and submit immediately at 13:30 to secure the grade.
goals.rationale: My value system prioritizes academic outcomes (0.5) above all else. The deadline is imminent, and my impulsive nature demands immediate action to eliminate the looming stressor rather than waiting or planning for later.

goals.description: Aggressively ignore all social cues, messages, and non-essential tasks until submission is confirmed.
goals.rationale: I am assertive and direct; I will set a hard boundary against any 'filler' interactions that threaten my focus or efficiency right now. Relationships are low priority (0.15) compared to the task at hand.

goals.description: Discard the 'note tidying' task entirely for this session.
goals.rationale: Procrastination bias is high (7); I will only do what is strictly necessary for the immediate win. Tidying has no urgent deadline and serves no immediate achievement goal.

desires: Instantly submit the assignment to eliminate the looming deadline and secure the grade.

Avoid any social interaction or 'filler tasks' that would waste the remaining minutes before submission.
